title.native: キャラディのジョークな毎日

synopsis: A gravure idol, Asada Misako, plays the main character Charady. Other characters are played by the students of Kyoto University of Art and Design Department of Character Designing. It is a short comedy animation about jokes from all parts of the world.

title.en: Why Didn`t You Say So Sooner?
Your Big Mouth Gets You Into Trouble
The Other End of the Line
